title: potentilla subarenaria
intro: Potentilla subarenaria, also known as the sandy cinquefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Potentilla subarenaria are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal supplements to support overall health and well-being.
